chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4631 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.19360/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 7 3. For order on Misc. No.19361/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 25.9.2025 Mr. Javed Ahmed Shar advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. According to learned counsel for the petitioner, the SHO Gulshan-e- Maymar Police Station, Karachi has taken the petitioner’s vehicle into his illegal custody. Learned counsel for the petitioner shall file application for return of his vehicle to the SHO, Gulshan-e-Maymar Police Station Karachi, who shall decide the same in accordance with law expeditiously once such application is received. A copy of this order shall be sent to the SSP Karachi West, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
